ddls:
CREATE TABLE "songs" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each song */,
  "song_title" TEXT /* Title of the song */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artist */,
  "city" TEXT /* City mentioned in the song */,
  "state" TEXT /* State mentioned in the song */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the song */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the song was added to the database */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Danceability metric of the song */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy metric of the song */,
  "key" INTEGER /* Musical key of the song */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Loudness metric of the song */,
  "mode" INTEGER /* Mode of the song (major or minor) */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Speechiness metric of the song */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Acousticness metric of the song */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Instrumentalness metric of the song */,
  "liveness" REAL /* Liveness metric of the song */,
  "valence" REAL /* Valence metric of the song */,
  "tempo" INTEGER /* Tempo of the song */,
  "duration_ms" INTEGER /* Duration of the song in milliseconds */,
  "time_signature" TEXT /* Time signature of the song */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the song (e.g., audio_features) */,
  "mood" TEXT /* Mood of the song (e.g., happy, sad) */,
  "explicit" INTEGER /* Whether the song is explicit or not */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the song */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the album */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_state FOREIGN KEY ("state") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_city FOREIGN KEY ("city") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the artist */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the artist's image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audio_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audio feature set */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the song */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Danceability metric of the song */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy metric of the song */,
  "key" INTEGER /* Musical key of the song */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Loudness metric of the song */,
  "mode" INTEGER /* Mode of the song (major or minor) */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Speechiness metric of the song */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Acousticness metric of the song */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Instrumentalness metric of the song */,
  "liveness" REAL /* Liveness metric of the song */,
  "valence" REAL /* Valence metric of the song */,
  "tempo" INTEGER /* Tempo of the song */,
  "duration_ms" INTEGER /* Duration of the song in milliseconds */,
  "time_signature" INTEGER /* Time signature of the song */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audio_features_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_states_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_uris" (
  "uri_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each URI */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the song */,
  "spotify_uri" TEXT /* Spotify URI of the song */,
  "track_href" TEXT /* Track href link */,
  "analysis_url" TEXT /* Analysis URL for the song */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("uri_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_uris_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_song_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the song */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., play, like, share) */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "playback_time" INTEGER /* Playback time of the song in milliseconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_song_interactions_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_song_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "subscription_type" TEXT /* Type of subscription (e.g., free, premium) */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the user */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_popularity" (
  "popularity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each popularity record */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the song */,
  "popularity_score" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the song */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date the popularity was recorded */,
  "stream_count" INTEGER /* Number of streams */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("popularity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_popularity_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the song */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was made */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_recommendations_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artist_genres" (
  "artist_genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist genre association */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artist */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artist_genres_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES song_genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artist_genres_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "album_name" TEXT /* Name of the album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artist */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the album */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the album's image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)
